title: The Mario Paint Totaka's Song Collab
description:
Are you ready to taste this delicious collab?!

I would like to thank all who were able to partake in this collab. The song idea is credit to Sandy/DarkKhezu, so please pet his head as sign of thanks! And DeeWal helped me render this project as it was too epicrob for my vegas to handle, so please give him a hug as well!

Totaka's song can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ruFzO2X-h8w

The chronological order of parts is as shown:
